summary: Iteration 24 testing complete. Verified all 8 features/bug fixes: (1) Specialist modal typing FIXED - SpecForm uses own useState, typed 'Test Doktor' smoothly, (2) Stát dropdown shows only 'Česko' and 'Svět', (3) Legal articles open as full detail pages with 'Zpět na Právní poradnu' back button, (4) Back navigation works correctly, (5) Google auth mode=login with invalid session returns 401/502, (6) Push VAPID key endpoint returns valid key, (7) Push subscribe/unsubscribe work with auth, (8) sw-push.js accessible with push handling code, (9) PWA icons/favicon return 200, (10) Section markers visible on homepage and legal page, (11) Homepage greeting shows 'Vítej,' correctly.

feature_test_results.specialist_modal_typing: PASS - Typed 'Test Doktor' without focus loss - key bug fix verified
feature_test_results.legal_article_full_page: PASS - Articles open as full detail page (not accordion)
feature_test_results.legal_back_navigation: PASS - Returns to article list correctly
feature_test_results.push_vapid_key_endpoint: PASS - Returns valid VAPID public key
feature_test_results.service_worker_accessible: PASS - /sw-push.js returns 200 with push handling code
feature_test_results.section_markers: PASS - Section markers visible on homepage and legal page

critical_code_review_comments: SpecForm at SpecialistsPage.js lines 122-188 uses own useState([f, setF]) - fixes focus loss bug by isolating form state from parent
Stát dropdown at lines 168-175 correctly limited to 'CZ' (Česko) and 'WORLD' (Svět)
LegalPage.js uses selectedArticle state (line 124) for detail view at lines 127-156
Push notification endpoints at server.py lines 2371-2393 properly implemented with VAPID key
sw-push.js in /public/ contains proper push and notificationclick event handlers
usePushNotifications hook at hooks/usePushNotifications.js properly handles subscribe/unsubscribe
Push banner in Layout.js lines 407-418 with enable/dismiss buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified all 8 features from the batch: (1) SpecForm component at SpecialistsPage.js lines 122-188 has isolated useState for form data - fixes focus loss bug, (2) Stát dropdown limited to CZ/WORLD, (3) Legal articles use selectedArticle state for full-page detail view with 'Zpět na Právní poradnu' back button, (4) Google auth mode=login rejects missing accounts with 404/no_account, (5) Push notification system fully implemented with VAPID key endpoint, subscribe/unsubscribe APIs, and sw-push.js service worker, (6) Push banner shows after login with enable/dismiss options (stored in localStorage bloom_push_dismissed), (7) Section markers using .section-marker CSS class with inline style backgrounds, (8) PWA icons in /public/icons/ and /public/assets/. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration24.py
